General.Name: Guangdong Tannery Ltd
General.Description: Namyue Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the processing and sale of semi-finished and finished leather in Mainland China. It is also involved in the processing cowhides; subcontracted leather processing activities; and trading leather. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Tannery Limited and changed its name to Namyue Holdings Limited in July 2022. The company was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Central, Hong Kong. Namyue Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Nam Yue (Group) Company Limited.
General.Address: Guangdong Investment Tower, Central, Hong Kong
